Heidi Vistisen, policy manager at Leap Sport Scotland, which promotes LGBTI participation in sport, made the remarks during a health committee… Read more May 25 2023 Sharron on GB News In the News , Latest By Sharron Davies 25 May 2023 Feminist groups have expressed shock after it was revealed that a Parkrun women’s record is still held by trans-athlete and criminal, Lauren Jeska. But should transgender women be excluded because of their physical advantage or are they being treated unfairly? Former Olympic swimmer Sharron Davies believes the gender category you perform in, should be based… Read more Apr 1 2023 In praise of Sharron Davies In the News , Latest By Sharron Davies 1 April 2023 It’s been quite a while since we celebrated any of Sharron Davies’s considerable achievements in the pool – well, a bronze and a silver in 1990 at Auckland was the last time – but I would bet a box full of brand-new Speedos to a secondhand pair of goggles that nothing has made her prouder… Read more Mar 25 2023 Thank you for standing up for female athletes In the News , Latest By Sharron Davies 25 March 2023 ‘Thank you for standing up for female athletes’: Ex-Olympic swimmer Sharron Davies praises World Athletics for voting to exclude transgender athletes from the women’s category Ex-swimmer Sharron Davies said the move shows woman are worthy of fair sport Former British Olympic swimmer Sharron Davies has come out in support of World Athletics’ decision to exclude transgender… Read more Mar 24 2023 Transgender women banned by World Athletics In the News , Latest By Sharron Davies 24 March 2023 Plymouth-born Olympic swimmer hails decision to ban transgender women from competing in female international events Plymouth-born Olympic swimmer Sharron Davies has hailed the landmark decision by World Athletics to ban transgender women from competing in female international events.
